Generated Narrative: CodeSystem WHORegionalOffices

This case-insensitive code system http://smart.who.int/trust/CodeSystem/WHORegionalOffices defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
AFRO WHO Regional Office for AfricaWHO Regional Office for Africa (AFRO)
AMRO WHO Regional Office for the AmericasWHO Regional Office for the Americas (AMRO/PAHO)
EMRO WHO Regional Office for the Eastern MediterraneanWHO Regional Office for the Eastern Mediterranean (EMRO)
EURO WHO Regional Office for EuropeWHO Regional Office for Europe (EURO)
SEARO WHO Regional Office for South-East AsiaWHO Regional Office for South-East Asia (SEARO)
WPRO WHO Regional Office for the Western PacificWHO Regional Office for the Western Pacific (WPRO)
OTHER Other ParticipantsParticipants that are not WHO Member States or State Parties
